title: clematis ibarensis subsp. ibarensis
intro: Clematis ibarensis subsp. ibarensis is a species of flowering plant in the buttercup family, native to the mountainous regions of Japan. It is used in traditional medicine, valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Clematis ibarensis subsp. ibarensis is often used as a decoction or tincture, typically in combination with other medicinal plants, to create teas, infusions, or topical treatments.
